control_summary: IdentityRepairSignal append opens or reuses one active IdentityRepairCase per frozen binding
Duplicate idempotency key or signal digest returns the first signal and case
Freeze advances lineage fence issuedFor identity_repair and blocks stale sessions grants and route intents
Request shell cannot resume until revalidated under corrected binding
Wrong-patient correction is not a request state or Episode.state mutation
Callbacks and conversations stay manual review only until release
External wrong-patient delivery requires compensation before release
File and artifact visibility suppresses stale PHI details
Support workspace remains read-only and manual review only
Seeded telephony links are quarantined and revalidated
Analytics branches are marked already_safe only when no patient-visible authority remains
IdentityBindingAuthority applies correction_applied or revoked after supervisor and independent review
Release settlement permits fresh read-only grants and route intents only after repair closure
Release settlement permits fresh claim-pending session posture
Release settlement permits writable authority only after rebuild and branch closure
External wrong-patient delivery has a compensation reference before release
Stale artifact visibility is terminally suppressed before release
Release settlement keeps recovery manual follow-up only without fresh self-service authority
